description: Notes from the human editor for the decider to factor into triage and patching. Read at the start of every run. Mark notes as consumed after acting on them.

notes.title: PAT in CLAUDE.md returns 403 on push — read works, write denied to GitHub user Devilwench
notes.body: During tinker run 2026-05-11T05:07 the PAT in CLAUDE.md (github_pat_11AQFYCRA0vYzgp62FNoQR_...) succeeded on ls-remote (read access works) but failed on push with: Permission to funwithscience-org/dome-model-review.git denied to Devilwench. The token-attributed identity appears to be a GitHub user without write access to the org. workspace-sync universal-pusher mode is rescuing this runs outputs (writes to FUSE → pushes from its own auth). Operator action: investigate whether the PAT has been rotated/transferred; rotate to a token attributed to a steve@ or org-admin account if needed. Until rotation, tinker (and any other agent that clones-and-pushes from a fresh PAT-injected clone) cannot push directly; workspace-sync hourly rescue is the workaround.

notes.title: Push 403 + workspace-sync outage: operator manual push required for commit edf2612a
notes.body: Decider run 2026-05-20T21:15 completed successfully (3679/0 tests) and committed edf2612a. Both git push and push-via-api.js returned 403 (Devilwench PAT auth issue per HNOTE-OPERATOR-PAT-AUTH-403-001). workspace-sync has not run since 2026-05-17T14:05Z (ISS-2166/ISS-2167 filed this run). Changed files copied to FUSE but rescue requires workspace-sync restart first. Manual action: (1) restart dome-workspace-sync scheduled task if stopped; OR (2) manually git push from a working clone: git -C <clone> push origin main. Commit: edf2612a. Changes: EXP-430 WIN-012 4-patch integration (BOU attribution + dome inconsistency surface + Part 6.14 xref), ISS-2153 readability patch, ISS-2164/2165 WIN-021.c4 holes filed, ISS-2166/2167/2168 integrity criticals/major filed.
